title: Digital Microfluidics & EWOD
tagline: Programmable droplets for automated biology and chemistry
taglineZh: 以可程式化液滴推動自動化生物與化學分析
why: Traditional microfluidic systems depend on pumps, tubing, and fixed channels. Digital microfluidics replaces this infrastructure with addressable electrodes that manipulate discrete droplets directly.
whyZh: 傳統微流體依賴幫浦、管線與固定流道；數位微流體則利用可獨立控制的電極直接操控離散液滴。
challenge: Reliable parallel droplet generation, volume uniformity, hydrogel and magnetic-bead handling, dielectric durability, and robust actuation remain central engineering challenges.
challengeZh: 平行液滴生成、體積均一性、水膠與磁珠操作、介電層耐久性及穩定驅動，是主要工程挑戰。
innovation: We study electrode geometry, electrowetting physics, droplet splitting, parallel operation, and energy-autonomous actuation to create scalable biomedical platforms.
innovationZh: 研究電極幾何、電濕潤物理、液滴分裂、平行操作與能源自主驅動，建立可擴充的生醫平台。
evidence: Programmable droplet transport, mixing, splitting, and dispensing
Parallel droplet generation and volume-control strategies
evidenceZh: 可程式化液滴輸送、混合、分裂與分注
平行液滴生成與體積控制策略
以 Disk-TENG 驅動數位微流體
future: AI-assisted experiment planning, autonomous laboratories, scalable parallel operation, and clinically relevant sample-to-answer systems.
futureZh: 結合 AI 實驗規劃、自主實驗室、可擴充平行操作，以及具臨床價值的 sample-to-answer 系統。

media.title: LEGO AFM: Micro- and nanotechnology education
media.titleZh: LEGO AFM：微奈米科技教育示範

title: AI-Assisted Hemodialysis Monitoring
titleZh: AI 智慧血液透析監測
tagline: Real-time optical monitoring for personalized dialysis
taglineZh: 以即時光學監測推動個人化透析
why: Conventional dialysis assessment relies on intermittent blood sampling and summary metrics that do not continuously reflect toxin removal or emerging risk.
whyZh: 傳統透析評估依賴間歇抽血與總結性指標，無法持續反映尿毒素清除與治療風險。
challenge: Overlapping optical signatures, patient variability, machine artifacts, and different biomarker dynamics complicate real-time prediction.
challengeZh: 光學訊號重疊、個體差異、設備干擾與不同指標動態，使即時預測更具挑戰。
innovation: The platform combines 255, 275, and 310 nm optical sensing with personalized variables and support vector regression.
innovationZh: 平台結合 255、275 與 310 nm 光學感測、個人化參數及支援向量迴歸。
evidence: Thirty sessions from nine ESRD patients
One-minute monitoring over about four hours
Prediction of six clinically relevant biomarkers
R² around 0.95 for several toxin predictions
evidenceZh: 九位 ESRD 病人、三十次療程
約四小時療程中每分鐘監測
預測六項臨床重要指標
多項尿毒素預測 R² 約達 0.95
future: Multicenter validation, intradialytic hypotension prediction, explainable AI, and hospital-system integration.
futureZh: 多中心驗證、透析中低血壓預測、可解釋 AI 與醫院系統整合。

media.title: Precision medicine and real-time clinical monitoring
media.titleZh: 精準醫療與即時臨床監測

title: Acoustofluidic Filtration
tagline: Bubble streaming for rapid separation and fouling control
taglineZh: 以氣泡聲流實現快速分離與抗污染
why: Microscale filtration is compact and selective, but filters rapidly foul when cells and particles accumulate near pores.
whyZh: 微尺度過濾具小型化與選擇性，但細胞與顆粒在孔口累積時容易迅速阻塞。
challenge: Maintaining throughput while preserving recovery, purity, and sample integrity is difficult for highly imbalanced mixtures.
challengeZh: 面對比例高度不均的樣品，要同時維持通量、回收率、純度與樣品完整性十分困難。
innovation: The device combines cross-flow filtration with acoustic streaming generated by oscillating trapped bubbles.
innovationZh: 裝置整合錯流過濾與受困氣泡振盪所產生的聲流。
evidenceZh: 後續 STR 分析成功
future: Improved bubble stability, higher throughput, real forensic samples, and integrated molecular analysis.
futureZh: 提升氣泡穩定性、增加通量、使用真實法醫樣品並整合分子分析。

title: Wearable & Paper-Based Sensors
tagline: Low-cost, high-sensitivity sensing for digital health
taglineZh: 面向數位健康的低成本高靈敏感測
why: Wearable sensors must conform to the body, detect subtle signals, remain comfortable, and be manufacturable at practical cost.
whyZh: 穿戴式感測器需貼合人體、偵測細微訊號、維持舒適性，並具備可實際製造的成本。
challenge: Sensitivity, range, miniaturization, repeatability, and integration often conflict.
challengeZh: 靈敏度、量測範圍、微型化、重複性與整合之間常存在取捨。
innovation: Origami structures, paper substrates, conductive nanomaterials, and engineered crease patterns amplify electrical response.
innovationZh: 利用摺紙結構、紙基材料、導電奈米材料與設計化摺痕放大電訊號。
evidence: Pulse, posture, bruxism, and trigger-finger demonstrations
evidenceZh: 脈搏、姿態、磨牙與扳機指展示
future: Smaller devices, multimodal sensing, washable integration, and clinical deployment.
futureZh: 更小型化、多模態感測、可清洗整合與臨床應用。

title: Soft Robotics & Programmable Materials
titleZh: 軟性機器人與可程式化材料
tagline: Magnetically programmed motion for safe and adaptive systems
taglineZh: 以磁性程式化運動打造安全且具適應性的系統
why: Rigid robots excel at precision but are less suited to delicate, uncertain, or human-centered environments.
whyZh: 剛性機器人在精準操作上表現優異，但較不適合脆弱、未知或以人為中心的環境。
challenge: Soft robots need controllable deformation, sufficient force, repeatable motion, and simple fabrication without losing compliance.
challengeZh: 軟性機器人需在保有柔順性的同時，實現可控制變形、足夠力量與可重複運動。
innovation: Magnetic anisotropy is programmed during curing to enable sectional actuation and biomimetic motion.
innovationZh: 在固化過程中設計磁性異向性，使系統可進行分區驅動與仿生運動。
evidence: Four-finger robot in air and water
evidenceZh: 四指機器人可於空氣與水中操作
指骨力量約 1.12 與 0.9 mN
future: Higher force density, integrated sensing, closed-loop control, and assistive applications.
futureZh: 提高力密度、整合感測與閉迴路控制，並發展輔助應用。

media.title: Soft robotic manipulation and the microhand
media.titleZh: 軟性機器人操控與微型仿生手

title: Thermal Management & Energy Systems
tagline: Thermal-fluid intelligence for batteries and high-power devices
taglineZh: 面向電池與高功率裝置的智慧熱流工程
why: Battery storage and high-power electronics are limited by temperature nonuniformity, hot spots, and airflow inefficiency.
whyZh: 儲能電池與高功率電子系統受限於溫度不均、局部熱點與氣流效率不足。
challenge: Large container systems contain complex flow paths, anisotropic cells, recirculation, and layout-dependent cooling.
challengeZh: 大型貨櫃系統具有複雜流道、異向性電芯、迴流與高度依賴配置的冷卻效能。
innovation: CFD, anisotropic thermal modeling, and parallel-flow cooling design improve system-level temperature control.
innovationZh: 結合 CFD、異向性熱模型與平行流冷卻設計，改善系統層級溫度控制。
evidence: Peak temperature reduced from about 42.3 to 37.5 °C
Temperature spread reduced from about 14.3 to 10.2 °C
future: Hybrid cooling with cold plates and phase-change materials, AI control, and experimental validation.
futureZh: 整合冷板與相變材料的混合冷卻、AI 熱管理與實驗驗證。
